channel.title: Prompts on 天漢帝國復興錄

item.title: Deeplearning-ChatGPT-Prompts-Tutorial
item.description: 前言 这里的代码因为 API 变化无法直接运行。。 这里的内容值得参考。。 注意： 1 You tried to access openai.ChatCompletion, but this is no longer supported in openai>=1.0.0 - see the README at [https://github.com/openai/openai-python](https://github.com/openai/openai-python) for the API. You can run `openai migrate` to automatically upgrade your codebase to use the
